rationale: Review 2 would lead to the better scoped PR because it removes the clearly confirmed premature `True` placeholder classes and defers `IsUnipotent`, while preserving plausible Layer-0 material instead of forcing an unconfirmed split/removal of `AffineAlgGroup`. I could confirm the placeholder fields and nilpotence definition from the diff, but not the roadmap-specific claim that bundling finite type with geometric reducedness is forbidden.
